name: ZLinq
desc: Zero allocation LINQ with LINQ to Span, LINQ to SIMD, and LINQ to Tree (FileSystem, JSON, GameObject, etc.) for all .NET platforms and Unity, Godot.
descFull: Zero allocation LINQ with LINQ to Span, LINQ to SIMD, and LINQ to Tree (FileSystem, JSON, GameObject, etc.) for all .NET platforms and Unity, Godot.
